tasks.title: Section Title
tasks.description:
## Context
2-5 sentences about what this section belongs to and why.

## Scope
- Bullet 1
- Bullet 2
- Bullet 3

## OpenSpec checklist (reference)
- [ ] N.1 Task description
- [ ] N.2 Task description

The task list can be found at openspec/changes/<change-name>/tasks.md

## Implementation plan (suggested chunks)
1. First chunk of work
2. Second chunk of work
3. Third chunk of work

## Acceptance criteria
- Build passes
- Tests pass
- All checklist items above are implemented and verified
- The task list at openspec/changes/<change-name>/tasks.md is updated

## Key references
- proposal.md (section: Why)
- design.md (section: Decisions)
- specs/<capability>/spec.md (section: Requirements)
